acceptance_criteria: Site approval is active; release model configuration and labeling exactly match the approved baseline
action_if_failed: Stop new analyses invoke downtime and notify Operations and Quality

acceptance_criteria: Live and ready checks pass in controlled mode with expected release and model identity
action_if_failed: Stop new analyses preserve evidence and escalate

acceptance_criteria: Named account MFA and expected role/site permissions work; no shared or stale access is observed
action_if_failed: Do not bypass access control; contact identity administrator

acceptance_criteria: Audit chain and immutable export are continuous; clocks synchronized; SIEM has no unresolved integrity alert
action_if_failed: Stop new analyses and notify Security Quality and Operations

acceptance_criteria: No active stop-use field-action clinical cybersecurity privacy or regulator restriction affects this site/release
action_if_failed: Apply notice scope quarantine affected results and escalate

acceptance_criteria: Storage/capacity are within limits; monitoring and last scheduled backup are healthy; support/on-call contacts available
action_if_failed: Resolve before use or invoke approved downtime based on risk

acceptance_criteria: User is competent and authenticated; case/specimen association verified in the validated laboratory system
action_if_failed: Do not analyze; correct through approved workflow

acceptance_criteria: Specimen tissue stain scanner resolution region file and quality are within approved labeling
action_if_failed: Reject input and use validated standard method

acceptance_criteria: Complete source and overlay reviewed including dense edge artifact and clinically important regions
action_if_failed: Do not accept output; perform required review or reject

acceptance_criteria: No unexplained missed fused fragmented or spurious result undermines the authorized use
action_if_failed: Reject output use standard method and report suspected malfunction when applicable

acceptance_criteria: Case reference source hash release/model settings result/report hash actor timestamp and audit receipt are correct
action_if_failed: Do not associate/export result; preserve request ID and escalate

acceptance_criteria: Failures rejections near misses misleading output possible harm and privacy/security concerns are reported through approved routes
action_if_failed: Preserve governed evidence invoke containment/downtime and report immediately

acceptance_criteria: Submitted completed rejected failed exported and unresolved cases reconcile; no stale or partial result remains
action_if_failed: Quarantine unresolved output investigate and hand over

acceptance_criteria: Accepted reports have provenance; audit has no gap; alerts downtime complaints and incidents are recorded and handed over
action_if_failed: Stop affected use preserve evidence and escalate
